Portrait sessions with editorial direction

A calm, guided experience built around flattering light, easy prompts, and images that feel like a magazine feature — still unmistakably you.

  • Best for: founders, creatives, couples
  • Includes: wardrobe support + location scouting
  • Deliverables: curated gallery + print-ready files
Explore sessions →

Weddings & engagements — refined, documentary coverage

Quiet confidence on a fast day. We capture the honest moments and the elevated portraits — with timelines and lighting handled.

  • Best for: full weekends, city hall, elopements
  • Includes: timeline + portrait plan
  • Option: 48-hour sneak peek
View wedding coverage →

Events & celebrations — fast, flattering, candid

From brand dinners to milestone parties, we photograph the energy and the details — with people-first storytelling and polished edits.

  • Best for: launches, birthdays, galas
  • Includes: candid + editorial portraits
  • Delivery: highlight set + full gallery
Plan your event coverage →

Brand photography — story-led visuals that convert

Campaign images and evergreen assets built around your positioning — consistent, editorial, and designed for web + press.

  • Best for: founders, teams, launches
  • Includes: creative direction + shotlist
  • Usage: web, press, social, ads
Build a campaign set →

Product & detail photography — warm, crisp, tactile

Elevated still life and product detail images with studio-level polish — built for ecommerce, lookbooks, and ad creative.

  • Best for: ecommerce, packaging, tabletop
  • Includes: styling suggestions + lighting plan
  • Deliverables: hero set + variants
See product coverage →

Lifestyle & family sessions — natural, editorial, home-ready

Simple prompts, beautiful light, and space for real connection — photographed with warmth and a polished, print-first finish.

  • Best for: families, couples, milestones
  • Includes: timing + location guidance
  • Delivery: curated gallery + print options
Plan a lifestyle session →
Service Overview Request Dates

MNY Photo — warm light, calm direction

We’re a small studio built for clients who want images that feel honest and elevated. Minimal gear on set, maximal attention to light, pacing, and comfort.

  • Based in NYC, available for travel
  • Editorial style with modern warmth
  • Guided experience from planning to delivery
Meet the studio →

A process that protects the vibe

We plan around light, movement, and story — then keep the session day simple. Direction is gentle and specific, so you never feel “posed.”

  • Creative direction + shot flow
  • Location + timing recommendations
  • Editing that stays true to skin tones
How we work →

The client experience: clear, warm, intentional

Expect clear communication, timeline-friendly pacing, and an easy gallery experience. We help you choose favorites and prep images for print and web.

  • Guided prep call + wardrobe notes
  • Candid moments + hero portraits
  • Print-ready delivery + sharing links
See what to expect →

Services

A small menu, delivered with big intention.

Portrait Sessions

Modern headshots and editorial portraits with calm direction.

Weddings & Engagements

Documentary coverage with refined portraits that feel effortless.

Events & Celebrations

Candid energy, flattering light, and detail coverage for fast days.

Brand Photography

Campaign sets and evergreen visuals designed for performance.

Product & Detail

Warm, crisp still life images built for ecommerce and lookbooks.

Lifestyle & Family

Natural moments photographed with editorial composition.

What we do (full guide)

The process

A clear path from inquiry to gallery delivery — built to keep you relaxed.

  1. Inquiry

    Share your date/timeframe, goals, and the kind of images you need. We respond with next steps and availability.

  2. Creative direction

    We align on mood, locations, and styling. You get a simple plan: what to bring, what to expect, and how we’ll shoot.

  3. Session day

    You’ll be guided with easy prompts and clear direction. We keep the energy steady and the pacing comfortable.

  4. Editing

    Warm, polished color, true skin tones, and consistency across the full story. Every gallery is curated with intention.

  5. Gallery delivery

    You receive a shareable gallery with print-ready downloads, favorites tools, and guidance for albums and wall art.

Signature style pillars

A consistent look that stays timeless — with room for your personality.

  • Cinematic light
  • Natural direction
  • Editorial composition
  • Warm, polished editing
Who we are

A small studio built for calm, confident sessions.

We keep sets light and direction clear — so your images feel natural, elevated, and deeply personal.

  • Pre-session planning with mood + shot flow
  • Location + wardrobe guidance that actually helps
  • Editing that respects skin and light

Testimonials

Realistic words from fictional clients — the kind we’re proud to earn.

Booking + investment

Pricing is shaped by time, complexity, and usage — not a one-size menu.

  • Session length + number of locations
  • Creative direction + shot count
  • Event coverage timing and deliverables
  • Commercial usage (web, press, ads)
Request availability

FAQ

Quick answers to common questions.

Do you help with poses?

Yes — we direct with simple prompts and small adjustments so you look natural. Think guided movement, not stiff posing.

How do we choose a location?

We start with your vibe and how you’ll use the images, then pick places that match the light. You’ll get 2–3 options with timing recommendations.

When do we get our gallery?

Turnaround depends on the project size. You’ll always receive a clear delivery window before we shoot, with an optional 48-hour sneak peek for select sessions.

Do you deliver black & white versions?

Absolutely. We include black & white conversions when they strengthen the story — not as an afterthought.
